reviews.comment:
La tradicional YPF del Automóvil Club Argentino es un punto de referencia casi histórico de la zona. Ofrece, además, para el/la viajero/a, un café en donde se pueden encontrar viandas, bebidas frescas y otros tantos servicios y productos indispensables para el/la que viaja. 100% recomendable

(Translated by Google)
The traditional YPF service station at the Automóvil Club Argentino is a near-historic landmark in the area. It also offers travelers a café where they can find packed lunches, cold drinks, and many other essential services and products. 100% recommended
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15679973824289135347/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzcllhSGVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Por ser una organización tan importante el ACA debería estar mas a mano,  no tan al costado de la ciudad

(Translated by Google)
Given its importance as an organization, the ACA should be more accessible, not so far out on the city's edge.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15679973824289135347/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvczlXcWNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Pocos playeros para tanta demanda de combustible. La atención de los mismos es muy buena, muy atent@s, pero el dueño media pila, que sume más personal..

(Translated by Google)
Too few attendants for such high demand for fuel. Their service is very good, they're very attentive, but the owner needs to be more proactive and hire more staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15679973824289135347/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcjRhLXdnRRAB
